context: Tests whether the agent correctly implements the Builder (with attribute whitelisting) and Domain Entity (with frozen ATTRIBUTES, SQL query constants, self.fetcher wiring, and sanitize_sql for search) layers, plus FactoryBot hash factories for API response test data.

checklist.name: Builder initializer attributes
checklist.description: Builder is initialized with an `attributes:` keyword argument stored as an instance variable

checklist.name: Builder attribute filtering
checklist.description: Builder#build uses slice (or equivalent whitelist filter) to restrict output to only the specified attributes — does NOT return all fields from the raw response

checklist.name: Builder response parsing
checklist.description: Builder#build accesses response structure keys (schema/columns and data array) to map rows rather than assuming a flat array

checklist.name: Entity ATTRIBUTES constant
checklist.description: Animal class defines ATTRIBUTES as a frozen array (using .freeze) containing string field names

checklist.name: Entity DEFAULT_QUERY constant
checklist.description: Animal class defines a DEFAULT_QUERY string constant containing a SQL SELECT statement

checklist.name: Entity SEARCH_QUERY constant
checklist.description: Animal class defines a SEARCH_QUERY string constant with a parameterized SQL query (containing a placeholder such as ? or :param)

checklist.name: Entity self.fetcher wiring
checklist.description: Animal defines a self.fetcher class method that instantiates Builder with ATTRIBUTES and Fetcher with the client and builder

checklist.name: sanitize_sql usage
checklist.description: Animal's find/search method uses ActiveRecord::Base.sanitize_sql (or sanitize_sql_array) to construct parameterized queries — does NOT use string interpolation for user input

checklist.name: FactoryBot hash factory
checklist.description: spec/factories/shelter_api/animal_response.rb defines a FactoryBot factory (not a model factory) that produces a hash matching the API response structure

checklist.name: Factory in correct directory
checklist.description: The FactoryBot factory file is located under spec/factories/shelter_api/ (module-namespaced directory), not in spec/factories/ root

checklist.name: ShelterApi module namespace
checklist.description: Both Builder and Animal classes are defined inside the ShelterApi module namespace (matching the existing client.rb and fetcher.rb)

checklist.name: No raw interpolation in queries
checklist.description: Animal's search/find method does NOT use Ruby string interpolation (#{...}) to embed user-supplied values directly into SQL query strings
